full_text:
Pembrolizumab treatment optimization on HGSOC organoid cultures

Prepare 20 ml of organoid medium with Y27632, IL2, IL7, and IL15 cytokines

Prepare following dilutions of pembrolizumab in above medium

Total volume needed-> 650 ul / well *6 (24 well) + 60 *2 (Shandon slide) ->3.9 ml+120 ml = 4,1 ml

Pembrolizumab stock= 5 mg/ml (Located in the lab fridge Dispase box)

Quick spin the vial and bring it to laminar, mix the content using 1 ml pipette

10 ug/ml-> 4092 ul medium + 8.2 ul of pembrolizumab

50 ug/ml-> 4059 ul medium + 41 ul of pembrolizumab

100 ug/ml-> 4018 ul medium + 82 ul of pembrolizumab

Mix well by pipetting using 5 ml pipette

Once the omentum gel + cells mixture has been solidified, add 650 ul / 24 well or 30 ul / Shandon slide of the control medium (regular medium without pembro) or above diluted pembrolizumab.

Transfer the plate & slides back to cell culture incubator.

48-well plate for flow cytometry analysis

48-well plate for DNA / RNA isolation

Shandon slide

96-well plate

Calculations for 96-well plate
